_comment: Temporary exercise modifications (injury, deload, etc). Delete this file or set 'active' to false when no longer needed. monday_setup.py reads it automatically.
_format: Each day can have: subtitle_override, remove (logNames to drop), weight_overrides (logName -> new weight + note), add_exercises (inserted after removes).
label: Adductor injury — replaces all running with elliptical

add_exercises.name: Adductor isometric squeeze
add_exercises.note: 🟢 REHAB — ball between knees, gentle isometric, stop if any pain

add_exercises.name: Gentle adductor stretch
add_exercises.note: 🟢 REHAB — butterfly or standing groin stretch, NO forcing

deadlift.note: ⚠ REDUCED from 155→135 — narrow stance, stop if groin pain. Adductors assist in deadlift.

thu.subtitle_override: ⚠ LEGS A MODIFIED — Adductor-Safe + Rehab + Core

add_exercises.name: Leg extension (machine)
add_exercises.note: ⚠ Replaces barbell squats — isolates quads, minimal adductor load

add_exercises.name: Hamstring curl (cable)
add_exercises.note: ⚠ Moved from Sun — minimal adductor involvement

add_exercises.name: Adductor isometric squeeze
add_exercises.note: 🟢 REHAB — progress from 10s holds on Mon

add_exercises.name: Copenhagen plank (short lever)
add_exercises.note: 🟢 REHAB — key adductor strengthening, knee on bench not foot. Skip if painful.

sun.subtitle_override: ⚠ LEGS B MODIFIED — Posterior Chain (Adductor-Safe) + Rehab + Core

add_exercises.name: Leg extension (machine)
add_exercises.note: ⚠ Replaces lunge walks — lunges heavily load adductors

add_exercises.name: Seated calf raise
add_exercises.note: ⚠ Replaces step-ups — step-ups engage adductors for stability

add_exercises.name: Adductor isometric squeeze
add_exercises.note: 🟢 REHAB — progressed from 15s holds on Thu
